Mortal Kombat (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $42,326,031Details
International Box Office $42,100,000
Worldwide Box Office $84,426,031
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,323,689
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $8,556,842
Total $13,880,531
Further financial details...

Synopsis

MMA fighter Cole Young, accustomed to taking a beating for money, is unaware of his heritage—or why Outworld's Emperor Shang Tsung has sent his best warrior, Sub-Zero, an otherworldly Cryomancer, to hunt Cole down. Fearing for his family’s safety, Cole goes in search of Sonya Blade at the direction of Jax, a Special Forces Major who bears the same strange dragon marking Cole was born with. Soon, he finds himself at the temple of Lord Raiden, an Elder God and the protector of Earthrealm, who grants sanctuary to those who bear the mark. Here, Cole trains with experienced warriors Liu Kang, Kung Lao and rogue mercenary Kano, as he prepares to stand with Earth’s greatest champions against the enemies of Outworld in a high stakes battle for the universe. But will Cole be pushed hard enough to unlock his arcana—the immense power from within his soul—in time to save not only his family, but to stop Outworld once and for all?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,302,503 (55.1% of total gross)
Legs:1.82 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$55,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,073 opening theaters/3,114 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $49,775,750

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 23rd, 2021 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
April 23rd, 2021 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: April 8th, 2021 (Wide) (South Korea)
April 9th, 2021 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
April 9th, 2021 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
April 9th, 2021 (Wide) (Saudi Arabia)
April 9th, 2021 (Wide) (Thailand)
Video Release: April 23rd, 2021 by Max
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence and language throughout, and some crude references.
(Rating bulletin 2671 (cert #53095), 3/10/2021)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Franchise: Mortal Kombat
Cast, crew, or production detail: Reboot
Plot point: Mixed Martial Arts, Tournament
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Atomic Monster, Broken Road
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English

Synopsis

MMA fighter Cole Young, accustomed to taking a beating for money, is unaware of his heritage—or why Outworld's Emperor Shang Tsung has sent his best warrior, Sub-Zero, an otherworldly Cryomancer, to hunt Cole down. Fearing for his family’s safety, Cole goes in search of Sonya Blade at the direction of Jax, a Special Forces Major who bears the same strange dragon marking Cole was born with. Soon, he finds himself at the temple of Lord Raiden, an Elder God and the protector of Earthrealm, who grants sanctuary to those who bear the mark. Here, Cole trains with experienced warriors Liu Kang, Kung Lao and rogue mercenary Kano, as he prepares to stand with Earth’s greatest champions against the enemies of Outworld in a high stakes battle for the universe. But will Cole be pushed hard enough to unlock his arcana—the immense power from within his soul—in time to save not only his family, but to stop Outworld once and for all?
